hooks.command: if [ "${CI:-}" = "true" ]; then exit 0; fi; cd backend && if [ ! -f .venv/bin/activate ] && command -v uv > /dev/null 2>&1; then uv sync --extra dev; fi && if [ -f .venv/bin/activate ]; then . .venv/bin/activate; fi
if [ "${CI:-}" = "true" ]; then exit 0; fi; cd frontend && if [ ! -d node_modules ]; then npm install --silent; fi

if [ "${CI:-}" = "true" ]; then exit 0; fi; if ! command -v gh > /dev/null 2>&1; then mkdir -p ~/.local/bin && GH_VERSION=$(curl -fsSL https://api.github.com/repos/cli/cli/releases/latest | grep -oP '"tag_name": "v\K[^"]+') && curl -fsSL -o /tmp/gh.tar.gz "https://github.com/cli/cli/releases/download/v${GH_VERSION}/gh_${GH_VERSION}_linux_amd64.tar.gz" && tar -xzf /tmp/gh.tar.gz -C /tmp && cp /tmp/gh_${GH_VERSION}_linux_amd64/bin/gh ~/.local/bin/ && rm -rf /tmp/gh.tar.gz /tmp/gh_${GH_VERSION}_linux_amd64; fi
